---
title: |
  Data Science for Electron Microscopy<br>
  Lecture 6: Gaussian Processes 1
bibliography: ref.bib
csl: custom.csl
author:
  - name: Philipp Pelz
    affiliation: 
      - FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: true

format:
    revealjs: 
        code-copy: true
        # scroll-view:
        #     activate: true
        #     snap: mandatory
        #     layout: full
        width: 1920
        height: 1080
        menu:
            side: right  
            width: wide 
        template-partials:
            - title-slide.html
        css: custom.css  
        theme: custom.scss 
        slide-number: c/t    
        logo: "eclipse_logo_small.png"  
        highlight-style: a11y 
        incremental: false   
        background-transition: fade  
        footer: "©Philipp Pelz - FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg - Data Science for Electron Microscopy"
---      
  
{{< include 00_learning_objectives.qmd >}}
 
   
                         
<!-- {{< include gaussian_processes.qmd  >}}    -->
{{< include 05_gp1.qmd >}} 
{{< include 05_gp2.qmd >}} 
{{< include 05_gp3.qmd >}}

{{< include 01_notation_guide.qmd >}}
## Scalability references to revisit

::: {.smaller}
- Sparse variational inducing-point GPs for dense data regimes: [@hensman_gaussian_2013].
- BBMM/GPyTorch and preconditioned conjugate gradients for scalable exact GP inference: [@gardner_gpytorch_2018; @wang_exact_2019].
- SGD-based posterior sampling for large-scale or ill-conditioned GP regression: [@lin_sampling_2023].
:::

## References   
::: {#refs} 
:::



 






































<script>
document.getElementById("marimo-frame").onload = function() {
    try {
        let iframeDoc = document.getElementById("marimo-frame").contentWindow.document;
        let marimoBadge = iframeDoc.querySelector("div.fixed.bottom-0.right-0.z-50");
        if (marimoBadge) {
            marimoBadge.style.display = "none";
            console.log("Marimo badge hidden successfully.");
        } else {
            console.log("Badge not found.");
        }
    } catch (error) {
        console.warn("Unable to modify iframe content due to CORS restrictions.");
    }
};
</script>
</div>
